title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — EMEA — Q2 FY2026 (May – July 2026)
summary: EMEA regulators are executing the world's most coordinated crypto compliance infrastructure buildout—211 authorized CASPs across 23 EU countries face MiCA Level 2 technical standards through September while AMLA becomes operational with direct supervision powers in Q3. The UK's FCA enforces September authorization deadlines, France's July 1 PSAN cutoff creates urgent compliance demand, and Middle Eastern regulators finalize comprehensive licensing frameworks.
